parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'id', m.id::TEXT,
        'conversationId', m.conversation_id::TEXT,
        'senderType', m.sender_type,
        'type', m.sender_type,
        'direction', m.direction,
        'messageType', m.message_type,
        'content', COALESCE(m.content_text, ''),
        'contentText', COALESCE(m.content_text, ''),
        'sender', json_build_object(
          'id', COALESCE(u.id::TEXT, m.sender_type),
          'name', COALESCE(u.display_name, u.external_user_id, m.sender_type),
          'type', m.sender_type,
          'avatar', u.picture_url
        ),
        'timestamp', m.created_at,
        'isRead', true
      ) ORDER BY m.created_at ASC
    )
    FROM messages m
    LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_user_id = u.id
    WHERE m.conversation_id = '{{ $json.query.conversationId }}'::UUID
      AND m.is_deleted = FALSE
    ), '[]'::json
  ) AS messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::INT FROM messages
   WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $json.query.conversationId }}'::UUID
     AND is_deleted = FALSE) AS total;
